channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ramaphosa seeks court order to suspend impeachment proceedings over Phala Phala inquiry
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has launched an urgent legal challenge at the Western Cape High Court to suspend parliament's section 89 impeachment proceedings. The application comes as the president seeks...

item.title: MMDA Suspends Gabriel Go’s Clearing Operations Following Teacher-Shaming Incident
item.description: The Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA) has suspended the clearing operations of its official, Gabriel Go, following an incident where he publicly reprimanded a teacher for not wearing a ...

item.title: Nigeria's Food Prices Rise Despite Slight Inflation Drop
item.description: Nigeria's overall inflation eased slightly in June 2026, but food prices kept climbing. Food inflation hit 17.52%, driven by staples like garri, tomatoes, yam, and crayfish. Experts say headline infla...

item.title: Daily Horoscope for July 16, 2026: Guidance for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: This article provides personalized horoscope predictions for each zodiac sign on July 16, 2026. Aries is urged to complete mundane tasks promptly to free up time for more exciting activities. Taurus i...

item.title: AI Startup Uses Brain Data to Diagnose Cognitive Disorders
item.description: Gidi Littwin, co-inventor of Apple’s FaceID and Vision Pro technologies, has founded Hemispheric, an AI startup aiming to revolutionize brain health diagnostics. The company raised $52 million after a...

item.title: Government sells Atrium of Makati units to boost public funds
item.description: The Department of Finance (DOF) announced the sale of 24 condominium units and 21 parking spaces in the decades-old Atrium of Makati, a low-rise building along Makati Avenue, to Sanpiro Realty Develop...

item.title: US Involvement in Libya's Political Chaos and Oil Interests
item.description: The article discusses the United States' strategic involvement in Libya's political landscape, focusing on efforts to stabilize the country through elite agreements rather than democratic elections. E...

item.title: Public Officials Spend KSh 760K on World Cup Tickets Amid Citizen Struggles
item.description: Governor Susan Kihika, Senator Aaron Cheruiyot, and businessman Sam Mburu attended the FIFA World Cup semi-final between France and Spain in Dallas, USA. The group occupied prime seats near the pitch,...

item.title: UK Investigates TikTok's Compliance with Child Safety Laws
item.description: The UK's communications regulator, Ofcom, has launched an investigation to check if TikTok is following laws to protect children online. The probe focuses on whether TikTok's age verification system m...

item.title: US VP Vance discusses Epstein's ties to intelligence agencies and Iran deal controversies

item.title: Systemic Healthcare Challenges Highlighted After 13-Hour Wait for First Nations Chief at Winnipeg Hospital

item.title: ANC's Use of Social Development Portfolio as Political Reward Raises Concerns

item.title: Junior Boks prepare for World Cup final showdown against France
item.description: The South African Junior Boks are on the brink of securing their second consecutive World Cup title after a dominant semifinal victory over England. The team, led by coach Kevin Foote and assistant Me...

item.title: EO-Executive Optical marks 58th anniversary with special promotions
item.description: EO-Executive Optical, a leading eyewear brand in the Philippines, is commemorating its 58th anniversary with a special anniversary sale. The event, which began on July 16, 2026, offers customers exclu...

item.title: Gladys Wanga Accuses Leaders of Orchestrating Kisumu Violence to Gain Sympathy
item.description: Homa Bay Governor Gladys Wanga has accused Siaya Governor James Orengo and Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna of organizing violence during a protest near St. Stephen's ACK Cathedral in Kisumu to create pub...

item.title: Trump's Bizarre Magnet Rant Confuses Defense Contractors
item.description: President Donald Trump, 80, reportedly urged attendees at the Pennsylvania Defense & Innovation Summit to 'do magnets' during a rambling speech that left defense contractors puzzled. The Daily Beast r...

item.title: England Fans in New York Lament Defeat to Argentina as Team Advances to Final
item.description: The article discusses the reaction of England football supporters based in New York City following their 2-1 defeat to Argentina in a crucial match. The loss has sent Argentina to the final against Sp...

item.title: Sanjay Raut demands probe into Ram Mandir treasurer over alleged financial irregularities
item.description: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Sanjay Raut has called for an investigation into Ram Mandir Trust Treasurer Govind Giri, alleging that the alleged theft from the temple's treasury occurred during his tenure. Raut ...
